free_text: Elastic and inelastic scattering of protons by
carbon-12 for proton energies between 18 and 30 MeV.
A telescope consisting of a gas
proportional counter and a 1/4-in. thick NaI(Tl)
Aluminum and hydrogen were used as absorbers.
Three corrections were applied to the yield recorded
by the pulse-height analyzer. These were
(a) the contribution to the yield from collimator
(b) the effect due to nuclear interactions of the
protons entering the NaI crystal, and
(c) the correction for counting losses in the
